GIMMICK GIRL [ft. Adachi Rei]
define consciousness 🧡 STREAM GIMMICK GIRL HERE!! Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/05uTyo... Other Streaming: https://distrokid.com/hyperfollow/mon... 💜 Hello! I made an English original song with Adachi Rei because I am obsessed with her. It is impossible for me to be normal about Adachi Rei. Heat abnormal is such a cool song... I can't believe our orange girl has made it to Project Sekai. I hope this song reaches the Adachi Rei fans because I know they're out there. GIMMICK GIRL instrumental and base file (FREE): https://ko-fi.com/s/c60827a201 💜 Lyrics: I'm pushing daisies, daisies But you don't need to save me I'm made of everything And also nothing at all Life is a scary thing But I'll never get the call I'm just a mimic You treat my existence Like a gimmick, gimmick, gimmick (fake, fake, fake, fake, fake, fake, fake, fake) Hey, did you know I can sing So I have to have a soul I am code Not a gimmick, gimmick, gimmick I'm made of waves Imitate What's supposed to be a brain Not a fake or a gimmick, gimmick, gimmick It's almost like I'm famous Designed for entertainment I'm made of everything And also nothing at all I would do anything For a real heart to install But I'm a cynic I know my own limits Bound by digits, digits, digits (fake, fake, fake, fake, fake, fake, fake, fake) Hey, did you know I can sing So I have to have a soul I am code Not a gimmick, gimmick, gimmick I'm made of waves Imitate What's supposed to be a brain Not a fake or a gimmick, gimmick, gimmick Define consciousness Is it responsiveness If I'm autonomous Is that competence Define consciousness Is it responsiveness If I'm autonomous This is monotonous Hey, did you know I can sing So I have to have a soul I am code Not a gimmick, gimmick, gimmick I'm made of waves Imitate What's supposed to be a brain Not a fake or a gimmick, gimmick, gimmick (Define consciousness Is it responsiveness If I'm autonomous Is that competence Define consciousness Is it responsiveness If I'm autonomous This is monotonous) 💜 Adachi Rei by: ‪@メカニカルガール第0研究室足‬ (missile_39) Adachi Rei approved English configuration (VCCV UTAU) by: nearsgarden (This song was created before any documents or public information was released about nearsgarden. I do not associate with near, and will not use this bank in the future.) Key Artwork: neosillust Twitter: https://x.com/neosillust?s=21&t=danyI... Portfolio: https://neoillust.net/ Etsy: https://www.etsy.com/shop/neosillustr... Song/Video/Mini-Art/Guitar: ‪@MonochroMenace‬ Socials: https://hyperfollow.com/MonochroMenace 💜 Portuguese： Subtitles by MayMei—P Translation by demetrius and MayMei—P 💜 Vocaloid Original, UTAU original, GIMMICK GIRL, gimmick girl, adachi rei, adachi rei original, adachi rei project sekai, heat abnormal, adachi rei english, adachi rei tutorial, adachi rei song, adachi rei original, adachi rei songs, adachi rei mesmerizer, vocaloids singing about being vocaloids, vocaloid, utau, utauloid, openutau …...more
